name: S-Adenosyl Methionine And Silybin Tablets
about: S-Adenosyl Methionine And Silybin Tablets are an effective veterinary treatment for dogs and cats. These tablets contain essential chemicals that aid in liver function and promote healthy liver metabolism. The active ingredients in these tablets help to boost the regeneration of liver cells and protect them from oxidative damage. The tablets come in a convenient physical form that is easy to administer to pets. The S-Adenosyl Methionine And Silybin Tablets are recommended for pets suffering from liver disorders such as hepatitis, cirrhosis, and fatty liver disease. They are also useful in preventing liver damage caused by toxins, drugs, and other harmful substances. These tablets provide a safe and effective solution for improving liver health in pets. Storage Instructions: It is recommended to store these tablets in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness.
